skills.name: Python
skills.summary: Primary language for model development, data preparation, and other project. I use typed, modular code to keep ML workflows maintainable.

skills.name: C
skills.summary: Used for low-level programming and other projects such as my imageviewer and ligh simulation

skills.name: Rust
skills.summary: Working understanding for more memory safe low level performance, used for ML projects such as a neural network and CNN

skills.name: TensorFlow
skills.summary: Applied for scalable training and model serving pipelines where ecosystem tooling is important. I use it for structured deployment workflows and reproducibility.

skills.name: Scikit-Learn
skills.summary: Go-to toolkit for classical ML, feature engineering, and baseline evaluation. Used mainly for data and model validation to compare models before deep learning.

skills.name: SQL
skills.summary: Used for creating local database, as well as user data.

featuredProjects.title: Automated Blog Posts
featuredProjects.description: Working with my local spa to create automated blog posts in their prefered writing style.
details: Built a demand forecasting workflow with calendar features and event-aware seasonality handling.
Automated retraining and backtesting improved forecast stability and reduced stock-out risk.

featuredProjects.title: Resume Ranker for Hiring
featuredProjects.description: NLP system that scores candidate resumes against role requirements with explainable criteria.
details: Used embedding similarity and keyword evidence to score role-resume alignment transparently.
Added recruiter-facing explanations to improve trust and reduce manual screening time.

featuredProjects.title: Medical Image Classifier
featuredProjects.description: CNN-based diagnostic support prototype with calibrated confidence and robust preprocessing.
details: Implemented augmentation and calibration to improve confidence quality in edge clinical samples.
Added evaluation slices across classes to diagnose model weaknesses before deployment.

featuredProjects.title: Customer Churn Predictor
featuredProjects.description: End-to-end binary classification workflow with feature store, model monitoring, and dashboarding.
details: Delivered a churn prediction service with feature lineage, threshold tuning, and business-aligned alerts.
Monitoring tracked drift and precision decay to trigger retraining before major performance loss.
